fields.status: string — clean | violation | uncertain | aligned | misaligned | drifted | gap-found | no-gap | question-ready | logged | profiled
fields.rule: string | null — rule ID and name if violated
fields.excerpt: string | null — exact offending text if violated

log.description: Returned by Agent 01 — the combined logger (human-logger and thinking-logger were merged into one)

fields.input_id: string — UUID4 the coordinator generates for this exchange
string — the input_id carried from the incoming message
fields.scope: string — what this party is trying to achieve

fields.reason: string | null — why misaligned, null if aligned

fields.question: string — one question for the human

fields.gap: string | null — description of the gap, null if none

harness_entry.description: Written by Agent 10 to the harness

fields.final_output: string — what was delivered to the human
